prose.en: Require the developer of the system, system component, or system service to select and employ security and privacy tracking tools for use during the development process.

guidance.en: System development teams select and deploy security and privacy tracking tools, including vulnerability or work item tracking systems that facilitate assignment, sorting, filtering, and tracking of completed work items or tasks associated with development processes.

prose.en: the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to select and employ security tracking tools for use during the development process;
the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to select and employ privacy tracking tools for use during the development process.

objects.en: procedures addressing development process, standards, and tools
procedures addressing the integration of security and privacy requirements into the acquisition process
acquisition contracts for the system, system component, or system service
documentation of the selection of security and privacy tracking tools
evidence of employing security and privacy tracking tools
Organizational personnel with system and service acquisition responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
